Hack The Box — Photobomb: From LFI to Root via PATH Hijack

CTF — PicoCTF 2025 Medium

PicoCTF 2025 — Format String Exploit: Leaking the Stack

A classic format string vulnerability in a 64-bit ELF binary with partial RELRO and no canary. We leak a stack address, calculate the return address...
